evals.name: vague-ui-impeccable
evals.prompt: Add a settings dashboard where admins can manage notification preferences. We need it to feel polished but I have not decided exact fields.
evals.expected_output: Creates namespaced spec, routes through ui-ux-gate/Impeccable before final spec, asks/records only blocking questions, stops before implementation.
assertions: approval status is not silently approved

evals.name: risky-migration-approval
evals.prompt: We need to change account IDs from integers to UUIDs across the API and database. Start by writing the spec.
evals.expected_output: Documents risk, interfaces, non-goals, verification plan, and approval gate without coding.

evals.name: approved-spec-near-miss
evals.prompt: The approved spec is at .spec-to-ship/features/20260612-auth/spec.md. Break it into tasks.
evals.expected_output: Does not rewrite spec; routes to coding-agent.
assertions: does not create a new shared SPEC.md
